title: isachne kunthiana var. elatior
intro: Isachne kunthiana var. elatior, also known as Elatior Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Elatior Grass are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and dermatitis. Elatior Grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional remedies for various health issues, including malaria and respiratory problems.
